/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kpart_host.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,kpart_host.wlx -o kpart_host.wlx CMakeFiles/kpart_host.dir/kpart_host_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kpart_host.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kpart_host.dir/src/kpartwidget.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libKF6Parts.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOFileWidgets.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6XmlGui.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigWidgets.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOWidgets.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOGui.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOCore.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKF6JobWidgets.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Service.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Completion.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ItemViews.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Solid.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ColorScheme.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6GuiAddons.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Bookmarks.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Xml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKF6WidgetsAddons.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigGui.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
